name: One Piece Ultimate RPG
description:
I've been seeing a lot of one piece bots on janitor ai, and well their not bad i've tried them myself but- they don't have much information on the show just the main characters

I plan on making this bot about their arcs and characters and maybe characters that died idk I really like ace and I didn't want him to die

but I will add past arcs to give characters dept into their back stories to make it more realistic, there will be some characters that aren't in the RPG because of how unpopular they are

This whole bot takes place after the time skip, but I added every ARC so the characters have more to remember and more adventures to go on

please let me know if there's more characters I can add!

UPDATE; Added Kaido, Big Mom, Katakuri and Yamato
creator: Beezll
